settings.question: How long does shipping take?
settings.answer: Domestic orders ship within 2–4 business days. International orders typically arrive within 7–14 business days.

settings.question: Can I exchange an item?
settings.answer: Yes — reach out via this form within 30 days of receiving your order and we'll sort it out.

settings.question: Do you ship internationally?
settings.answer: We ship worldwide. Duties and taxes may apply depending on your country.

settings.question: How do I track my order?
settings.answer: You'll receive a tracking link via email once your order ships. Check your spam folder or contact us if you haven't received it.
